steps: Both terms have the same variable part $x^3$, so subtract the coefficients: $12 - 5 = 7$.
choiceAnalysis:
• Choice A — '$7x^6$': Exponents are not added when subtracting like terms; the exponent stays 3. ✗
  • Choice B — '$17x^3$': $17 = 12 + 5$, not $12 - 5$. This would be the sum, not the difference. ✗
  • Choice C — '$7x^3$': $12 - 5 = 7$ and the exponent remains 3. ✓
  • Choice D — '$17x^6$': Both the coefficient and exponent are wrong. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
